title: selago acutibractea
intro: Selago acutibractea, also known as Blue Mountain-sage or Blue-spike, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Selago acutibractea can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
